body_preview: # Pre-College Programs ## ##### Pre-College Programs The Academy offers several pre-college programs that provide unique opportunities to students in grades K-12 with each program targeting a specific age range. Our pre-college programs help students to better understand Massachu
description: The Academy hosts many camps and offers several pre-college programs that provide unique opportunities to students in grades K-12 with each program targeting a specific age range. Our pre-college programs help students to better understand Massachusetts Maritime Academy’s culture, a chance to experience what life is like as a cadet at the Academy, and the various opportunities that will be provided to them by enrolling.
title: Pre-College Programs | Massachusetts Maritime Academy
